task.title: Prepare API Endpoints for CodeArena
task.desc: Build /questions and /submit routes for the Python quiz scoring system.

task.title: CodeArena Quiz UI
task.desc: Design the quiz page with timer, question cards, and score results display.

task.title: Write Python quiz questions
task.desc: Create easy and medium difficulty questions in questions.json for CodeArena.

task.title: Dark mode for TaskFlow dashboard
task.desc: Test all color contrasts against WCAG 2.1 standards for dark mode compatibility.

task.title: Connect login to dashboard
task.desc: Fix post-login redirect so the full TaskFlow dashboard loads instead of a blank page.

task.title: Integrate CodeArena in sidebar
task.desc: Add CodeArena navigation link and quiz stat card on the dashboard.

task.title: Task API CRUD endpoints
task.desc: Implement GET, POST, PUT, DELETE for /task to manage CodeArena project tasks.

task.title: Kanban board for My Tasks
task.desc: Build the To do / In progress / Done columns with member avatars and task cards.

task.title: Quiz timer & submit flow
task.desc: Add 30-second countdown timer and answer submission to CodeArena quiz page.

task.title: User authentication for admin
task.desc: Set up login page with users.json credentials for secure access to TaskFlow.
